Interface DocumentWriter

All Superinterfaces:
Consumer<List<Document>>
All Known Subinterfaces:
VectorStore
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractObservationVectorStore, AzureVectorStore, BedrockKnowledgeBaseVectorStore, CassandraVectorStore, ChromaVectorStore, CoherenceVectorStore, CouchbaseSearchVectorStore, ElasticsearchVectorStore, FileDocumentWriter, GemFireVectorStore, MariaDBVectorStore, MilvusVectorStore, MongoDBAtlasVectorStore, Neo4jVectorStore, OpenSearchVectorStore, OracleVectorStore, PgVectorStore, PineconeVectorStore, QdrantVectorStore, RedisVectorStore, S3VectorStore, SimpleVectorStore, TypesenseVectorStore, WeaviateVectorStore
public interface DocumentWriter extends Consumer<List<Document>>
Write a list of Document instances.

Christian Tzolov
